questions.text: Please describe the tasks you perform related to managing users, groups, or access to systems.
questions.notes: Look for mentions of creating users, assigning roles, or managing groups.

questions.text: Which systems, applications, or resources do you need to configure, monitor, or manage?
Which types of access or permissions are you responsible for granting, approving, or reviewing?
questions.notes: Highlights operational/admin roles like approver or policy contributor.

questions.text: How often do you modify access rights, create users, or review logs?
questions.notes: Frequency can indicate tier (daily = operational/admin, rare = contributor or read-only).

questions.text: Do you make decisions that affect security policies, compliance, or organizational access?
questions.notes: Signals higher-tier roles like platform_admin or policy_admin.

questions.text: How broad is your responsibility: team-level, department-level, or organization-wide?
Do you create, update, or review access policies? If so, how frequently?
questions.notes: Helps distinguish between policy_contributor, policy_admin, or policy_reader.

questions.text: Do you monitor or analyze user activity, security logs, or access reports?
questions.notes: Identifies security analyst, compliance_officer, or auditor roles.

questions.text: Do you generate reports on user access, group membership, or policy usage?
Are there any tasks not mentioned above that involve managing access, permissions, or compliance in your role?
questions.notes: Catch-all for anything missed, useful for AI nuance.
